prompt_pack_reference: Zubair Trabzada — Build Your Own JARVIS, 6 Prompts

gaps_closed_this_version.name: model_provider passthrough broken
gaps_closed_this_version.fix: Added model_provider field to ChatRequest (backend/main.py:47). Per-request provider override now flows from frontend dropdown to call_llm(). Model switching is real.

gaps_closed_this_version.name: No boot greeting
gaps_closed_this_version.fix: loadGraph() now builds a time-appropriate greeting (Good morning/afternoon/evening + note count) and speaks it on first user click. Respects browser audio gate exactly as Jarvis Prompt 5 specifies.

gaps_closed_this_version.name: SOUL.md personality incomplete
gaps_closed_this_version.fix: SOUL.md v1.3 — direct wit, one line + facts, no camera on small talk, no note recitation, SLC ecosystem knowledge, P.A.S.S. cover letters, free model guide, data export steps.

gaps_closed_this_version.name: /api/remember confirmation message generic
gaps_closed_this_version.fix: Four rotating witty confirmations based on note title hash. Never the same generic message twice for the same concept.

gaps_closed_this_version.name: Fly-to-source threshold wrong (6 not 4)
gaps_closed_this_version.fix: lightCluster() now flies to top node when < 4 source notes; lights whole cluster when 4+. Matches Jarvis Prompt 4 spec exactly.

jarvis_prompt_pack_compliance.prompt_2_brain: ✅ /api/chat, keyword scoring, top-6 notes, Anthropic API, session history, per-request model override NOW FIXED
jarvis_prompt_pack_compliance.prompt_3_voice: ✅ speechSynthesis out + webkitSpeechRecognition in, status line (listening/thinking), audio gate handled
jarvis_prompt_pack_compliance.prompt_4_magic: ✅ fly-to-source on < 4 notes, whole cluster on 4+, spoken answer short, note on screen
jarvis_prompt_pack_compliance.prompt_5_personality: ✅ SOUL.md wit, direct, no recitation, no camera on small talk, boot greeting speaks on first click
jarvis_prompt_pack_compliance.prompt_6_total_recall: ✅ /api/remember detects 'remember that', saves .md, rebuilds graph, returns new node, live galaxy update, witty confirm
